description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a hard, dark brown cover and reinforced edges in a lighter, reddish-brown color. The sides of the book feature a geometric pattern with diagonal and horizontal lines on a light gray background, giving it a modern, stylized appearance. The book appears to be quite thick and sturdy, with a solid, block-like form. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and smooth, suitable for stacking or placing other objects on top. There are no visible illustrations, text, or decorative elements on the cover or spine. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with a focus on durability and clean lines.
description: A thick, rectangular book with a hard, dark brown cover, reinforced reddish-brown edges, and geometric patterned sides. The design is minimalistic and modern.
description_view_0: The short end of the book is visible, showing the reinforced reddish-brown edges and geometric side pattern.
description_view_1: The long side of the book is visible, highlighting the full geometric pattern and the flat, dark brown cover.
description_view_2: The opposite short end of the book is shown, mirroring the reinforced edges and geometric pattern seen in view 0.
description_view_3: The other long side of the book is visible, identical to view 1 with the geometric pattern and flat cover.
